activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Ensure you have your daily essentials and comfortable walking shoes ready.
activities.description: Depart from your accommodation to begin your day of exploration in Lisbon.

activities.name: A Padaria Portuguesa
activities.notes: Try the 'pão de Deus' (God's bread), a sweet brioche-like bun topped with coconut.
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Portuguese breakfast with fresh bread, pastries like 'pão de Deus,' and coffee. It's a popular spot for locals and tourists alike, offering a taste of authentic Portuguese bakery.

activities.name: Castelo de São Jorge
activities.notes: Book tickets online in advance to avoid queues. Wear comfortable shoes for walking on uneven surfaces.
activities.location: R. de Santa Cruz do Castelo, 1100-129 Lisboa
activities.imageQuery: Castelo de São Jorge Lisboa views
activities.description: Explore the ancient castle walls, enjoy panoramic views of Lisbon, and discover the archaeological site. This historic landmark offers a deep dive into the city's past and stunning photo opportunities.

activities.name: Miradouro das Portas do Sol
activities.notes: Grab a refreshing drink from one of the nearby kiosks while enjoying the view.
activities.location: Largo das Portas do Sol, 1100-411 Lisboa
activities.imageQuery: Miradouro das Portas do Sol Alfama
activities.description: Take a moment to relax and soak in one of Lisbon's most iconic views over the Alfama district and the Tagus River. It's a perfect spot for photography and enjoying the city's charm.

activities.name: Ponto Final
activities.notes: Take the ferry from Cais do Sodré to Cacilhas. The restaurant is a short walk along the river from the Cacilhas ferry terminal. Arrive early or make a reservation for a riverside table.
activities.description: Enjoy fresh seafood and traditional Portuguese dishes with unparalleled views of Lisbon's skyline across the Tagus River. This unique restaurant offers a memorable dining experience in a rustic setting.

activities.name: Baixa-Chiado Exploration & Santa Justa Lift
activities.notes: Consider buying a 24-hour public transport ticket which includes the lift. After the lift, walk towards the river to Praça do Comércio.
activities.imageQuery: Santa Justa Lift Lisbon Baixa Praça do Comércio
activities.description: Explore the grid-like streets of Baixa, take the iconic Santa Justa Lift for city views, and then walk to Praça do Comércio to relax by the river. This combines the lift experience with the grand square.

activities.name: Cervejaria Ramiro
activities.notes: Expect a wait, as they don't take reservations. Order the 'Gambas à la Aguillo' (garlic prawns) and 'Sapateira' (stone crab).
activities.description: Indulge in some of the freshest seafood Lisbon has to offer, from giant prawns to succulent crab. This bustling, no-frills establishment is a true Lisbon institution, famous for its quality and lively atmosphere.

activities.name: Tasca do Chico
activities.notes: Arrive early to secure a good spot, as it gets very crowded. Be respectful and quiet during performances.
activities.location: R. do Diário de Notícias 39, 1200-141 Lisboa
activities.description: Experience an authentic Fado show in an intimate setting, featuring traditional Portuguese music and soulful singing. This small, cozy tavern is known for its genuine Fado performances and local atmosphere.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Plan your route back to the hotel, considering public transport or a taxi.
activities.description: Return to your accommodation after a full day of exploring Lisbon.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Ensure you have your daily essentials and comfortable walking shoes ready.
activities.description: Depart from your accommodation to begin your day of exploration in Lisbon.

activities.name: Fábrica da Nata
activities.notes: Enjoy your pastel de nata warm, sprinkled with cinnamon and powdered sugar.
activities.description: Start your day with freshly baked Pastel de Nata and a coffee in a vibrant setting. This spot is known for its delicious custard tarts, a must-try Portuguese delicacy.

activities.name: Mosteiro dos Jerónimos
activities.notes: Book tickets online to skip the long queues, especially for the cloister. Dress respectfully as it is a religious site.
activities.description: Marvel at the stunning Manueline architecture of this UNESCO World Heritage site, including the church and the magnificent cloister. This monastery is a testament to Portugal's Age of Discoveries.

activities.name: Torre de Belém
activities.notes: The interior can be crowded; focus on the exterior architecture and riverside views if time is short.
activities.description: Visit this iconic 16th-century fortress, another UNESCO site, offering historical insights and views of the Tagus River. It served as a ceremonial gateway to Lisbon and a defense tower.

activities.name: Pastéis de Belém
activities.notes: The queue for takeout can be long, but the sit-down area often moves faster and offers a more relaxed experience.
activities.description: Taste the original and most famous Pastel de Nata, made from a secret recipe since 1837. Enjoy them warm with a coffee in the historic café or take them to go.

activities.name: MAAT - Museu de Arte, Arquitetura e Tecnologia
activities.notes: Walk up to the rooftop for panoramic views of the Tagus River and the 25 de Abril Bridge.
activities.description: Explore contemporary art, architecture, and technology in a stunning riverside building. The museum's unique wave-like architecture is a work of art itself, offering great views from its rooftop.

activities.name: Time Out Market Lisboa (Mercado da Ribeira)
activities.notes: It can get very busy, especially during peak dinner hours. Walk around first to see all the options before deciding.
activities.description: Choose from a wide variety of gourmet food stalls featuring some of Lisbon's best chefs and traditional dishes. This vibrant food hall offers a lively atmosphere and options for every taste.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Plan your route back to the hotel, considering public transport or a taxi.
activities.description: Return to your accommodation after a full day of exploring Lisbon.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Ensure you have your daily essentials and comfortable walking shoes ready.
activities.description: Depart from your accommodation to begin your day of exploration in Lisbon.

activities.name: Pastelaria Versailles
activities.notes: Try their 'Bolo Rei' (King Cake) if it's in season, or any of their exquisite cakes and savories.
activities.description: Enjoy breakfast in a grand, historic café known for its beautiful Art Nouveau interior and delicious pastries. It's a classic Lisbon establishment, perfect for a refined start to the day.

activities.name: Museu Calouste Gulbenkian
activities.notes: Don't miss the Modern Collection building and take a stroll through the surrounding gardens.
activities.description: Discover an impressive collection of ancient and modern art, including Egyptian artifacts, European paintings, and French decorative arts. The museum is set within beautiful gardens, offering a peaceful escape.

activities.name: Parque Eduardo VII & Miradouro do Parque Eduardo VII
activities.notes: The best views are from the top of the park, near the Marquês de Pombal roundabout.
activities.description: Walk through this large park, enjoying its manicured hedges and the stunning panoramic view of Lisbon, extending down to the Tagus River. It's a great spot for photography and a refreshing break.

activities.name: A Brasileira
activities.notes: Take a photo with the statue of Fernando Pessoa outside.
activities.description: Dine at one of Lisbon's most iconic and historic cafes, famous for its literary connections and classic Portuguese dishes. Enjoy the elegant atmosphere and a meal in the heart of Chiado.

activities.name: Shopping in Chiado & Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara
activities.notes: After shopping, head towards the miradouro for a relaxing view before dinner. Visit Livraria Bertrand, the world's oldest operating bookstore.
activities.imageQuery: Chiado shopping Miradouro São Pedro de Alcântara
activities.description: Explore the elegant shopping district of Chiado, browsing boutiques and bookstores, then walk up to Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara for a final panoramic view of the city. This combines retail therapy with a scenic break.

activities.name: Solar dos Presuntos
activities.notes: Make a reservation as it's very popular. Try the 'Arroz de Marisco' (seafood rice) or any of their excellent grilled fish.
activities.location: R. das Portas de Santo Antão 150, 1150-269 Lisboa
activities.description: Savor classic Portuguese cuisine, especially their renowned seafood and meat dishes, in a traditional and lively setting. This restaurant is a favorite among locals and celebrities.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Plan your route back to the hotel, considering public transport or a taxi.
activities.description: Return to your accommodation after a full day of exploring Lisbon.

days.theme: Paris Icónica e Charme do Sena

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Prepare-se para um dia cheio de descobertas na capital francesa.
activities.description: Início do dia a partir do seu alojamento no coração de Paris.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Café da manhã no Angelina Paris
activities.notes: Chegue cedo para evitar filas, especialmente com um carrinho de bebê. Experimente o "Chocolat chaud à l'ancienne l'Africain".
activities.imageQuery: Angelina Paris Rue de Rivoli interior
activities.description: Desfrute de um café da manhã clássico parisiense com croissants frescos e o famoso chocolate quente. É um local elegante e histórico, perfeito para começar o dia.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Museu do Louvre
activities.notes: Compre ingressos online com antecedência para evitar filas. Use a entrada do Carrousel du Louvre para acesso mais fácil com carrinho e menos espera.
activities.location: Rue de Rivoli, 75001 Paris, France (Entrada da Pirâmide)
activities.description: Explore as coleções de arte mundialmente famosas, incluindo a Mona Lisa e a Vênus de Milo. Priorize as alas mais importantes para não sobrecarregar as crianças.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Jardim das Tulherias
activities.notes: Há cadeiras disponíveis para sentar e descansar. Ótimo para um lanche rápido ou para deixar o bebê esticar as pernas.
activities.location: Place de la Concorde, 75001 Paris, France
activities.description: Faça uma pausa relaxante nos jardins históricos, perfeitos para as crianças correrem um pouco ou para um passeio tranquilo. Desfrute das fontes e esculturas.

activities.name: Almoço no Le Soufflé
activities.notes: Faça reserva com antecedência, pois é um local popular. Peça o soufflé de queijo e o de chocolate para uma experiência completa.
activities.location: 36 Rue du Mont Thabor, 75001 Paris, France
activities.description: Experimente os famosos soufflés doces e salgados neste charmoso restaurante parisiense. Uma experiência gastronômica única e deliciosa para toda a família.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Actividad familiar en Paris
activities.notes: Alternativa para familias en lugar de Passeio de barco pelo Sena (Bateaux Mouches)
activities.location: Port de la Bourdonnais, 75007 Paris, France

activities.name: Torre Eiffel e Champ de Mars
activities.notes: Não é necessário subir na torre para apreciar a vista e o ambiente. Há playgrounds no Champ de Mars para as crianças.
activities.location: Champ de Mars, 5 Avenue Anatole France, 75007 Paris, France
activities.description: Admire a icónica Torre Eiffel de perto e relaxe nos vastos gramados do Champ de Mars. Perfeito para fotos e para as crianças brincarem.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Jantar no Les Cocottes Arc de Triomphe
activities.notes: Experimente o frango assado na cocotte. Ambiente acolhedor e familiar, ideal para um jantar descontraído.
activities.imageQuery: Les Cocottes Arc de Triomphe interior
activities.description: Desfrute de pratos franceses modernos servidos em cocottes (panelas de ferro fundido) neste restaurante casual e elegante. Opções saudáveis e saborosas.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Descanse para o próximo dia de aventuras.
activities.description: Regresso ao alojamento após um dia intenso de visitas em Paris.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Prepare-se para explorar o charmoso bairro de Montmartre.
activities.description: Início do dia a partir do seu alojamento no coração de Paris.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Café da manhã no Le Consulat
activities.notes: Chegue cedo para conseguir uma mesa com vista. Perfeito para fotos e para observar o movimento da rua.
activities.description: Desfrute de um café da manhã num dos cafés mais icónicos e pitorescos de Montmartre. Sinta a atmosfera boémia e histórica do bairro.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Actividad familiar en Paris
activities.notes: Alternativa para familias en lugar de Basílica do Sacré-Cœur
activities.location: 35 Rue du Chevalier de la Barre, 75018 Paris, France

activities.name: Place du Tertre
activities.notes: Ótimo para encontrar uma lembrança única ou ter um retrato feito. Mantenha as crianças por perto devido à multidão.
activities.description: Passeie por esta praça vibrante onde artistas locais pintam e vendem suas obras. Uma experiência autêntica e colorida de Montmartre.

activities.name: Almoço no La Mère Catherine
activities.notes: Peça um assento na esplanada se o tempo permitir para observar o movimento da praça. Experimente o "Coq au Vin".
activities.description: Desfrute de uma refeição tradicional francesa neste restaurante histórico na Place du Tertre. Experimente pratos clássicos num ambiente acolhedor.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Arco do Triunfo
activities.notes: Compre ingressos online para evitar filas. Use o túnel subterrâneo para chegar à base do arco com segurança.
activities.location: Place Charles de Gaulle, 75008 Paris, France
activities.description: Suba ao topo do Arco do Triunfo para vistas espetaculares dos Campos Elísios e da cidade. Admire a arquitetura e a chama eterna.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Paris.

activities.name: Passeio pelos Campos Elísios
activities.notes: Há muitas lojas e cafés para uma pausa. Cuidado com o tráfego intenso e as multidões.
activities.description: Caminhe pela famosa avenida, admire as lojas de luxo e os edifícios históricos. Perfeito para um passeio relaxante e para sentir o glamour parisiense.

activities.name: Actividad familiar en Paris
activities.notes: Alternativa para familias en lugar de Jantar no Le Bistrot Paul Bert

tripName: Aventura y Naturaleza en Las Batuecas

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Asegúrate de tener todo listo para un día de exploración.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Comienza el día desde tu alojamiento en el corazón de La Alberca, un punto de partida ideal para explorar el pueblo y sus alrededores.

activities.name: Desayuno en Café Bar La Plaza
activities.notes: Prueba las tostadas con jamón ibérico, un clásico de la zona.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Café Bar La Plaza La Alberca desayuno
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno tradicional con tostadas y café en la animada Plaza Mayor de La Alberca. Observa el ambiente matutino del pueblo mientras planificas el día.

activities.name: Paseo por el Casco Histórico de La Alberca
activities.notes: No te pierdas la Plaza Mayor y la Iglesia de Nuestra Señora de la Asunción.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Explora las calles empedradas y la arquitectura tradicional de La Alberca, el primer pueblo de España declarado Conjunto Histórico-Artístico. Admira sus casas con entramados de madera y balcones floridos.

activities.name: Mirador de La Alberca
activities.notes: Ideal para una parada rápida y admirar el entorno antes de comer.
activities.location: Carretera SA-201, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Disfruta de vistas panorámicas del pintoresco pueblo de La Alberca y el impresionante paisaje de la Sierra de Francia. Es un lugar perfecto para capturar fotografías y apreciar la belleza natural.

activities.name: Almuerzo en Restaurante La Abuela Cándida
activities.notes: Reserva con antelación, especialmente si vas en fin de semana. Prueba el jamón ibérico de bellota.
activities.location: Calle del Puente, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Restaurante La Abuela Cándida La Alberca comida
activities.description: Degusta la cocina tradicional serrana en un ambiente acogedor, con especialidades como el cabrito asado o las patatas meneás. Es un referente gastronómico en La Alberca.

activities.name: Visita a Miranda del Castañar y su Castillo
activities.notes: El castillo ofrece visitas guiadas en ciertos horarios, consulta antes de ir.
activities.location: Plaza de España, 1, 37650 Miranda del Castañar, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Explora este encantador pueblo medieval, declarado Conjunto Histórico-Artístico, y visita su imponente castillo del siglo XV. Pasea por sus murallas y disfruta de las vistas.

activities.name: Paseo y compras de productos locales en La Alberca
activities.notes: Busca tiendas con denominación de origen para el jamón y los embutidos.
activities.location: Calle del Agua, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Regresa a La Alberca y aprovecha para pasear por sus calles y adquirir productos típicos de la Sierra de Francia, como embutidos, quesos o miel.

activities.name: Cena en Restaurante El Balcón de la Plaza
activities.notes: Pide una mesa en el balcón si el tiempo lo permite para disfrutar de las vistas.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Restaurante El Balcón de la Plaza La Alberca
activities.description: Disfruta de una cena con vistas a la Plaza Mayor, probando platos elaborados con productos de la tierra. Su terraza es ideal para las noches de primavera.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Disfruta de la tranquilidad nocturna del pueblo.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Regreso al alojamiento para descansar después de un día completo de exploración.

days.theme: Corazón de Las Batuecas: Monasterio y Naturaleza

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Lleva calzado cómodo y agua para las caminatas.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Comienza el día desde tu alojamiento en La Alberca, preparándote para una jornada de naturaleza y aventura en Las Batuecas.

activities.name: Desayuno en Horno y Cafetería La Albercana
activities.notes: Prueba sus dulces tradicionales, como los perrunillas o mantecados.
activities.location: Calle del Agua, 2, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Horno y Cafetería La Albercana desayuno
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno con bollería recién hecha y café en esta popular cafetería local. Es un buen lugar para cargar energías antes de la excursión.

activities.name: Senderismo al Monasterio de San José del Desierto (Las Batuecas)
activities.notes: El sendero es de dificultad media, lleva agua y calzado adecuado. El monasterio es de clausura, la visita es exterior.
activities.location: Carretera SA-201, Km 20, 37624 Las Batuecas, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Senderismo Monasterio San José del Desierto Las Batuecas
activities.description: Realiza una caminata por el impresionante Parque Natural de Las Batuecas hasta llegar al Monasterio de San José del Desierto. Disfruta de la exuberante vegetación y la tranquilidad del valle.

activities.name: Visita exterior del Monasterio de San José del Desierto
activities.notes: Respeta la tranquilidad del lugar y las normas de los monjes.
activities.location: Monasterio de San José del Desierto, 37624 Las Batuecas, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Monasterio San José del Desierto Las Batuecas
activities.description: Admira la arquitectura y el entorno de este monasterio carmelita descalzo, enclavado en un paraje de gran belleza natural. Aunque es de clausura, su exterior y la paz del lugar son impresionantes.

activities.name: Almuerzo en Restaurante El Chiringuito de Las Mestas
activities.notes: Pregunta por los platos del día y no olvides probar la miel de la zona.
activities.location: Carretera SA-201, Km 23, 37624 Las Mestas, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Restaurante El Chiringuito Las Mestas comida
activities.description: Disfruta de un almuerzo casero en el pequeño pueblo de Las Mestas, conocido por su miel y su ubicación junto al río Batuecas. Prueba platos sencillos pero sabrosos de la cocina local.

activities.name: Ruta al Chorro de las Batuecas
activities.notes: El sendero puede ser resbaladizo en algunas zonas, lleva calzado adecuado.
activities.location: Sendero del Chorro, 37624 Las Batuecas, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Realiza una ruta de senderismo para descubrir el impresionante Chorro de las Batuecas, una cascada que forma pozas naturales. Es una experiencia refrescante y de gran belleza natural.

activities.name: Regreso a La Alberca y descanso
activities.notes: Aprovecha para relajarte y prepararte para la noche.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Tras un día de senderismo, regresa a La Alberca para un merecido descanso antes de la cena.

activities.name: Cena en Restaurante La Cantina
activities.notes: Prueba sus carnes a la brasa o alguno de sus guisos caseros.
activities.location: Calle del Agua, 10, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Restaurante La Cantina La Alberca interior
activities.description: Disfruta de una cena en un ambiente rústico y acogedor, con una carta que combina platos tradicionales con toques modernos. Es conocido por su buena relación calidad-precio.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Prepara tus cosas para el último día de exploración.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Regreso al alojamiento para descansar después de un intenso día de naturaleza.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Asegúrate de tener todo empacado o listo para la salida final.
activities.location: Plaza Mayor, 1, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Último día de la ruta, saliendo del alojamiento para explorar más rincones de la Sierra de Francia.

activities.name: Desayuno en Bar El Encuentro
activities.notes: Prueba el pincho de tortilla, muy popular entre los locales.
activities.location: Calle del Agua, 12, 37624 La Alberca, Salamanca, España
activities.imageQuery: Bar El Encuentro La Alberca desayuno
activities.description: Disfruta de un último desayuno en La Alberca en un ambiente local y auténtico. Es un buen lugar para un café rápido y un pincho.

activities.name: Mirador de la Peña de Francia
activities.notes: La carretera de acceso es sinuosa, conduce con precaución. El santuario también se puede visitar.
activities.location: Santuario de Nuestra Señora de la Peña de Francia, 37621 El Cabaco, Salamanca, España
activities.description: Asciende al Santuario de la Peña de Francia para disfrutar de unas vistas espectaculares de 360 grados sobre la Sierra de Francia y Las Batuecas. Es uno de los puntos más altos de la zona.

activities.name: Visita al pueblo de Mogarraz y sus retratos
activities.notes: Pasea sin prisa por sus calles para descubrir todos los retratos y sus historias.

tripName: Saint Petersburg Imperial Grandeur and Artistic Treasures

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Ensure you have comfortable walking shoes for the day ahead.
activities.description: Start your day from your central Saint Petersburg accommodation.

activities.name: Pyshechnaya
activities.notes: Cash only, be prepared for a queue but it moves fast. Try the classic pyshki with powdered sugar.
activities.description: Enjoy traditional Russian doughnuts (pyshki) and coffee at this iconic, historic cafe. It's a beloved local spot for a quick and cheap breakfast.

activities.name: Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood
activities.notes: Purchase tickets online in advance to avoid queues, especially during peak season. Photography is usually allowed without flash.
activities.imageQuery: Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood interior mosaics
activities.description: Marvel at the stunning onion domes and intricate mosaic work of this unique church built on the spot where Emperor Alexander II was assassinated. Step inside to be completely surrounded by over 7,000 square meters of mosaics.

activities.name: State Hermitage Museum and Winter Palace
activities.notes: Book tickets online well in advance. Prioritize specific halls or collections to make the most of your time, as the museum is vast.
activities.description: Explore one of the world's largest and oldest museums, housed in the magnificent Winter Palace. Focus on the main state rooms and key art collections like Rembrandt, Leonardo da Vinci, and Impressionists.

activities.name: Stolovaya №1 Kopeyka
activities.notes: Self-service, point to what you want. Great for trying various Russian comfort foods on a budget.
activities.description: Experience a traditional Russian 'stolovaya' (cafeteria) offering a wide range of hearty and affordable Russian dishes. Choose from soups, salads, main courses like cutlets and blini, and desserts.

activities.name: St. Isaac's Cathedral
activities.notes: Consider taking a short bus ride or taxi from Nevsky Prospekt to save time and effort, as it's just over 1.5 km. The colonnade climb involves many stairs but offers the best views.
activities.description: Admire the colossal architecture and opulent interiors of one of the largest cathedrals in the world. Climb the colonnade for panoramic views of Saint Petersburg's skyline.

activities.name: Canal Boat Tour
activities.notes: Many operators offer tours; look for one with an English audio guide. Dress warmly, as it can be chilly on the water even in summer.
activities.description: Discover Saint Petersburg from its waterways, often called the 'Venice of the North.' Enjoy picturesque views of palaces, bridges, and embankments from a different perspective.

activities.name: Teremok
activities.notes: Take public transport (metro or bus) or a taxi from the Moika River area to Nevsky Prospekt for dinner. Try the 'Ilya Muromets' blini (meat and cheese) or a sweet one with condensed milk.
activities.description: Savor traditional Russian blini (crepes) with various sweet and savory fillings, along with other Russian fast-casual dishes. It's a popular chain offering authentic flavors in a quick setting.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Enjoy a final stroll along Nevsky Prospekt if you have energy left.
activities.description: Return to your accommodation after a day of exploring Saint Petersburg's imperial sights.

activities.name: Colosseum, Roman Forum & Palatine Hill
activities.notes: Book tickets online in advance to avoid queues. Wear comfortable shoes. Consider public transport (Metro B to Colosseo).
activities.address: Piazza del Colosseo, 1, 00184 Roma RM, Italy
activities.description: Explore the iconic amphitheater, the political heart of ancient Rome, and the legendary hill where Rome was founded.

activities.name: Dinner in Rione Monti
activities.notes: Try Cacio e Pepe or Carbonara. Monti is a short walk from the Colosseum area.

activities.name: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel
activities.notes: Dress code applies (shoulders and knees covered). Book tickets well in advance. Use public transport (Metro A to Ottaviano).
activities.description: Explore one of the world's greatest art collections, culminating in Michelangelo's masterpiece in the Sistine Chapel.

activities.name: St. Peter's Basilica & Square
activities.notes: Free entry, but expect security lines. Dress code applies. Short walk from Vatican Museums.
activities.address: Piazza San Pietro, 00120 Città del Vaticano
activities.description: Visit the largest church in the world, a masterpiece of Renaissance architecture, and its grand piazza.

activities.name: Lunch in Prati
activities.notes: Many pizzerias and casual eateries available.
activities.description: Grab a quick and delicious lunch in the elegant Prati neighborhood, just outside Vatican City.

activities.name: Castel Sant'Angelo (exterior view)
activities.notes: Great photo opportunities from Ponte Sant'Angelo. Walkable from St. Peter's Square.
activities.description: Admire the impressive circular fortress, once Hadrian's Mausoleum, from the outside and walk along the Tiber River.

activities.name: Dinner in Prati
activities.notes: A good area for a more relaxed evening after a day of sightseeing.
activities.description: Enjoy dinner in the elegant Prati district, known for its wide avenues and good restaurants.

activities.name: Pantheon
activities.notes: Free entry. Can get crowded. Walkable from Prati or public transport to Largo di Torre Argentina.
activities.address: Piazza della Rotonda, 00186 Roma RM, Italy
activities.description: Visit the remarkably preserved ancient Roman temple, now a church, famous for its oculus.

activities.name: Piazza Navona
activities.notes: Enjoy the street artists and lively atmosphere. Short walk from the Pantheon.
activities.description: Stroll through one of Rome's most beautiful Baroque squares, featuring Bernini's Fountain of Four Rivers.

activities.name: Trevi Fountain
activities.notes: Always crowded, but worth seeing. Walkable from Piazza Navona.
activities.address: Piazza di Trevi, 00187 Roma RM, Italy
activities.description: Toss a coin into the world-famous Baroque fountain to ensure your return to Rome.

activities.name: Lunch near Trevi Fountain
activities.notes: Many options, from quick slices of pizza to sit-down meals.
activities.description: Find a local trattoria for lunch in the bustling historic center.

activities.name: Spanish Steps & Piazza di Spagna
activities.notes: A popular spot for people-watching. Walkable from Trevi Fountain.
activities.address: Piazza di Spagna, 00187 Roma RM, Italy
activities.description: Climb the famous Spanish Steps and enjoy the elegant atmosphere of Piazza di Spagna.

activities.name: Stroll in Villa Borghese Park
activities.notes: Consider renting a rowboat on the lake or a bike. Walkable from Spanish Steps.
activities.address: Piazzale Napoleone I, 00197 Roma RM, Italy
activities.description: Relax and enjoy a leisurely walk through Rome's third-largest public park, offering beautiful gardens and views.

activities.name: Dinner near Spanish Steps
activities.notes: Many upscale and mid-range options available.
activities.description: Enjoy dinner in the elegant area around the Spanish Steps.

activities.name: Explore Trastevere & Santa Maria in Trastevere

activities.address: Piazza di Santa Maria in Trastevere, 00153 Roma RM, Italy

activities.name: Lunch in Trastevere
activities.notes: Look for local specialties.
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Roman lunch in one of Trastevere's many authentic trattorias.

activities.name: Janiculum Hill Panoramic Views
activities.notes: A great spot for photos. Walkable from Trastevere, though it's an uphill climb.

activities.name: Dinner in Trastevere

days.theme: Antigüedad Menos Conocida y Sabores Locales

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Asegúrate de tener todo lo necesario para el día.
activities.location: Via del Corso, 100, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Comienza tu día desde tu alojamiento en el corazón de Roma.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Desayuno en Caffè Greco
activities.notes: Es un lugar caro pero la experiencia histórica lo vale. Pide en la barra para ahorrar un poco.
activities.location: Via dei Condotti, 86, 00187 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno en el segundo café más antiguo de Italia, un lugar histórico y elegante. Pide un café y un cornetto para empezar el día con estilo.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Termas de Caracalla
activities.notes: Reserva tus entradas con antelación online para evitar colas y considera la audioguía para una mejor comprensión.
activities.location: Viale delle Terme di Caracalla, 52, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Explora las impresionantes ruinas de uno de los complejos termales más grandes y lujosos de la antigua Roma. Imagina la vida social y los rituales de baño de los romanos.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Almuerzo en Checchino dal 1887
activities.notes: Prueba la 'coda alla vaccinara' (rabo de toro) o los 'rigatoni con la pajata' si buscas una experiencia culinaria romana auténtica.
activities.location: Via di Monte Testaccio, 30, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de la auténtica cocina romana en este histórico restaurante en el barrio de Testaccio. Es famoso por sus platos tradicionales y su ambiente clásico.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Jardín de los Naranjos (Giardino degli Aranci)
activities.notes: Busca el famoso 'Buco della Serratura' (cerradura) en la Piazza dei Cavalieri di Malta, cerca del jardín, para una vista única de la Cúpula de San Pedro.
activities.location: Piazza Pietro D'Illiria, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Relájate en este hermoso jardín en la Colina del Aventino y disfruta de una de las vistas panorámicas más espectaculares de Roma. No te pierdas la famosa 'cerradura' de la Orden de Malta.

activities.name: Paseo por el Circo Máximo
activities.notes: Visita al atardecer para disfrutar de una luz hermosa sobre las ruinas y las colinas circundantes.
activities.location: Via del Circo Massimo, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Recorre el sitio del antiguo estadio de carreras de carros más grande de Roma, imaginando los espectáculos que tuvieron lugar aquí. Es un vasto espacio abierto ideal para un paseo tranquilo.

activities.name: Cena en Armando al Pantheon
activities.notes: Es esencial reservar con mucha antelación, ya que es un lugar muy popular y pequeño. Prueba la carbonara o la amatriciana.
activities.location: Salita dei Crescenzi, 31, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de una cena en esta clásica trattoria romana, conocida por sus platos tradicionales y su ubicación privilegiada cerca del Panteón. Es un favorito tanto de locales como de visitantes.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Descansa para el día siguiente.
activities.location: Via del Corso, 100, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Regresa a tu alojamiento después de un día completo explorando Roma.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Asegúrate de tener todo lo necesario para el día.
activities.location: Via del Corso, 100, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Comienza tu día desde tu alojamiento en el corazón de Roma.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Desayuno en Pasticceria Regoli
activities.notes: Llega temprano para encontrar la mejor selección de dulces frescos.
activities.location: Via dello Statuto, 60, 00185 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno en esta histórica pastelería romana, famosa por sus dulces tradicionales. Prueba el 'maritozzo con la panna', un bollo dulce relleno de nata.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Galleria Doria Pamphilj
activities.notes: Alquila la audioguía narrada por el príncipe Doria Pamphilj para una experiencia personal y fascinante.
activities.location: Via del Corso, 305, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Explora esta magnífica galería de arte privada, que alberga una impresionante colección de obras maestras en un palacio histórico. Admira obras de Velázquez, Caravaggio y Bernini.

activities.name: Almuerzo en Da Enzo al 29
activities.notes: Llega temprano o prepárate para esperar, ya que no aceptan reservas y es muy concurrido.
activities.location: Via dei Vascellari, 29, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de una comida auténtica en esta popular trattoria en Trastevere, conocida por sus platos romanos tradicionales y su ambiente animado. Es un favorito local.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Exploración del Quartiere Coppedè
activities.notes: Busca el Arco de los Duendes y la Fuente de las Ranas, dos de los elementos más distintivos del barrio.
activities.description: Descubre este singular complejo arquitectónico con un estilo ecléctico y fantasioso, que parece sacado de un cuento de hadas. Admira sus edificios ornamentados y detalles únicos.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Paseo por Villa Borghese
activities.notes: Considera alquilar una bicicleta o un bote en el lago para una experiencia diferente y divertida.
activities.location: Piazzale Napoleone I, 00197 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Relájate en uno de los parques públicos más grandes y hermosos de Roma, con sus jardines, fuentes y vistas panorámicas. Es perfecto para un paseo tranquilo.

activities.name: Cena en Trattoria Monti
activities.notes: Reserva con mucha antelación, ya que es un lugar muy popular. Prueba los tortelli con huevo y trufa.
activities.location: Via di San Vito, 13/A, 00185 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de una cena en este aclamado restaurante, conocido por su cocina de la región de Las Marcas con influencias romanas. Ofrece platos creativos y de alta calidad.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.notes: Descansa para el día siguiente.

activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.notes: Asegúrate de tener todo lo necesario para el día.
activities.location: Via del Corso, 100, 00186 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Comienza tu día desde tu alojamiento en el corazón de Roma.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Desayuno en Bar San Calisto
activities.notes: Es un lugar sencillo y concurrido, ideal para experimentar la vida local.
activities.location: Piazza di S. Calisto, 3, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno auténtico en este icónico bar de Trastevere, un verdadero punto de encuentro local. Sumérgete en el ambiente romano y disfruta de un buen café.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Basílica de Santa Cecilia en Trastevere
activities.notes: La entrada a la iglesia es gratuita, pero hay una pequeña tarifa para visitar la cripta y las excavaciones arqueológicas.
activities.location: Piazza di Santa Cecilia, 22, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Visita esta hermosa basílica dedicada a Santa Cecilia, con su impresionante cripta y restos romanos subterráneos. Admira los mosaicos y la atmósfera de tranquilidad.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Paseo por el barrio de Trastevere
activities.notes: Explora sin rumbo fijo para encontrar tus propios rincones favoritos y pequeñas boutiques.
activities.location: Piazza di Santa Maria in Trastevere, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Recorre las encantadoras y estrechas calles adoquinadas de Trastevere, descubriendo sus plazas escondidas, tiendas de artesanía y vibrante vida local. Es uno de los barrios más pintorescos de Roma.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Almuerzo en Tonnarello
activities.notes: Suele haber cola, pero avanza rápido. Llega un poco antes de la hora punta si quieres evitar una espera larga.
activities.location: Via della Paglia, 1/2/3, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de un almuerzo en este popular restaurante de Trastevere, famoso por sus platos de pasta romana tradicional. Prueba los tonnarelli cacio e pepe o la carbonara.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Colina del Gianicolo y Fontana dell'Acqua Paola
activities.notes: Es un lugar perfecto para tomar fotografías y disfrutar de la puesta de sol si el horario lo permite.
activities.location: Piazzale Giuseppe Garibaldi, 00165 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Sube a la Colina del Gianicolo para disfrutar de unas vistas panorámicas impresionantes de Roma. Visita la majestuosa Fontana dell'Acqua Paola, una de las fuentes más bellas de la ciudad.

activities.name: Cena en Felice a Testaccio
activities.notes: Es absolutamente imprescindible reservar con mucha antelación, ya que es extremadamente popular.
activities.location: Via Mastro Giorgio, 29, 00153 Roma RM, Italia
activities.imageQuery: Felice a Testaccio cacio e pepe
activities.description: Disfruta de una cena en este restaurante legendario en Testaccio, mundialmente famoso por su cacio e pepe. Es un clásico de la cocina romana.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Desayuno en Panella L'Arte del Pane
activities.notes: Prueba sus especialidades de pan y sus pasteles frescos para un comienzo delicioso del día.
activities.description: Disfruta de un desayuno en esta histórica panadería y pastelería, famosa por sus panes artesanales y dulces. Es un lugar con encanto y mucha tradición.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Catacumbas de Priscilla
activities.notes: Se recomienda una visita guiada para comprender mejor la historia y el arte de este lugar sagrado.
activities.description: Explora una de las catacumbas más antiguas y significativas de Roma, con frescos paleocristianos y tumbas subterráneas. Descubre la historia de los primeros cristianos.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.name: Almuerzo en L'Archeologia
activities.notes: Aprovecha la ubicación para combinar tu comida con la exploración de la Vía Appia.
activities.location: Via Appia Antica, 139, 00179 Roma RM, Italia
activities.description: Disfruta de un almuerzo en este restaurante ubicado cerca de la Vía Appia Antica, ofreciendo cocina romana en un entorno histórico. Es un lugar ideal para reponer fuerzas.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

activities.description: Pasea por las ruinas del centro político, religioso y comercial de la antigua Roma. Sube al Monte Palatino para disfrutar de vistas panorámicas del Foro y el Circo Máximo.

tripName: Toledo Family History and Gastronomy Trip

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Have strollers or carriers ready for the little ones.
activities.location: Calle de la Sillería, 3, 45001 Toledo, España
activities.imageQuery: Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company
activities.description: Start your day from the Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company, ready to explore the historic city. Ensure everyone is prepared for a day of walking and discovery.

activities.name: Catedral Primada Santa María de Toledo
activities.notes: Arrive early to avoid crowds, especially with a toddler. Consider purchasing tickets online in advance.
activities.location: Plaza del Ayuntamiento, s/n, 45002 Toledo, España
activities.description: Explore the magnificent Toledo Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic architecture. Marvel at its stunning stained glass, chapels, and the impressive main altarpiece.

activities.name: Plaza del Ayuntamiento
activities.notes: Find a bench for a quick rest and snack for the toddler.
activities.description: Take a leisurely stroll around the main square, admiring the facades of the Cathedral, the Town Hall, and the Archbishop's Palace. It's a perfect spot for a short break and some fresh air.

activities.name: Sinagoga de Santa María la Blanca
activities.notes: The interior is relatively small, making it manageable for a family with a toddler.
activities.location: Calle de los Reyes Católicos, 4, 45002 Toledo, España
activities.imageQuery: Sinagoga Santa María la Blanca interior
activities.description: Visit this beautiful former synagogue, known for its Mudejar architecture and horseshoe arches. It offers a peaceful atmosphere and a glimpse into Toledo's multicultural past.

activities.name: Restaurante La Orza
activities.notes: Make a reservation, especially for lunch, to ensure a table with space for a stroller.
activities.location: Calle de la Sillería, 7, 45001 Toledo, España
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Castilian lunch at La Orza, known for its regional dishes and cozy ambiance. Try the 'carcamusas' or 'perdiz a la toledana' for an authentic taste of Toledo.

activities.name: Museo Sefardí (Sinagoga del Tránsito)
activities.notes: The museum is relatively small and easy to navigate, suitable for a shorter visit with young children.
activities.location: Calle Samuel Levi, s/n, 45002 Toledo, España
activities.description: Explore the Sephardic Museum, housed in the stunning El Tránsito Synagogue, to learn about the history and culture of the Jewish community in Spain. Admire the intricate plasterwork and the women's gallery.

activities.name: Family-friendly break
activities.notes: Auto-replaced to respect mobility/family constraints
activities.location: Barrio de la Judería, 45002 Toledo, España

activities.name: Mazapán Santo Tomé
activities.notes: Try the 'figuritas de mazapán' for a classic taste.
activities.description: Indulge in Toledo's famous marzipan at Santo Tomé, a historic confectionery. Pick up some sweet treats as souvenirs or for an afternoon snack.

activities.name: Restaurante Alfileritos 24
activities.notes: This restaurant is popular; booking a table in advance is highly recommended.
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful dinner at Alfileritos 24, offering a modern take on traditional Spanish cuisine in a charming setting. Their varied menu has options for all tastes.

activities.name: Vuelta al alojamiento
activities.notes: Prepare for the next day's adventures.
activities.location: Calle de la Sillería, 3, 45001 Toledo, España
activities.imageQuery: Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company
activities.description: Return to the Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company for a restful night after a day of exploring Toledo's rich history.

activities.name: Salida del alojamiento
activities.notes: Ensure everyone is well-rested and fed for the day ahead.
activities.location: Calle de la Sillería, 3, 45001 Toledo, España
activities.imageQuery: Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company
activities.description: Begin your second day from the Áurea Toledo by Eurostars Hotel company, ready for more Toledo discoveries.

activities.name: Alcázar de Toledo (Museo del Ejército)
activities.notes: The museum is large, so prioritize areas of interest. There are elevators for stroller access to some floors.
activities.location: Calle de la Unión, s/n, 45001 Toledo, España
activities.description: Visit the iconic Alcázar of Toledo, a historic fortress now housing the Army Museum. Explore its impressive courtyards, military collections, and enjoy panoramic views from its towers.

activities.name: Plaza de Zocodover
activities.notes: Grab a coffee or a small snack from one of the surrounding cafes.
activities.description: Relax in Toledo's bustling main square, Plaza de Zocodover, a central hub for locals and visitors. It's a great spot for people-watching and a quick break.

activities.name: Museo de Santa Cruz

activities.location: Calle de la Sillería, 4, 45001 Toledo, España

activities.imageQuery: El Greco Burial of the Count of Orgaz

activities.name: Restaurante La Clandestina de Toledo

activities.description: Enjoy a modern Spanish lunch at La Clandestina, known for its creative dishes and charming atmosphere. Their menu offers fresh ingredients and innovative flavors.

activities.location: Plaza de San Nicolás, 3, 45001 Toledo, España

activities.name: Jardines de la Vega

activities.location: Paseo de la Vega, 45003 Toledo, España

activities.location: Calle Real del Arrabal, 45003 Toledo, España

activities.notes: A great way to save energy and enjoy the views as you go up.
activities.description: Utilize the convenient escalators (Subida Mecanizada) to ascend to the upper part of the city. This is a fun and easy way to navigate Toledo's hilly terrain, especially with a toddler.

activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Roma.

tripName: Nueva York Highlights: Historia y Gastronomía

activities.name: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island Ferry
activities.notes: Arrive at Battery Park at least 30 minutes before your scheduled ferry time for security screening.
activities.imageQuery: Statue of Liberty Ellis Island ferry
activities.description: Take the ferry from Battery Park to Liberty Island to see the Statue of Liberty up close, then continue to Ellis Island to explore the Immigration Museum and learn about the history of immigrants entering the US. Book tickets in advance, especially if you want crown access.

activities.name: Lunch at Katz's Delicatessen
activities.notes: Grab a ticket at the door, order at the counter, and don't lose your ticket! Tip your counterman.
activities.location: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
activities.description: Experience a classic New York deli. Order their famous pastrami on rye sandwich, a true culinary institution. It's a bustling, historic spot with a unique ordering system.

activities.name: 9/11 Memorial & Museum
activities.notes: Book your timed entry tickets online in advance to avoid long queues. Allow ample time for reflection.
activities.description: Pay respects at the reflecting pools of the 9/11 Memorial, then explore the museum's exhibits detailing the events of September 11, 2001, and its impact. It's a powerful and moving experience.

activities.name: Wall Street & Charging Bull
activities.notes: The area around the Charging Bull can be very crowded; arrive later in the afternoon for slightly fewer people.
activities.description: Walk through the historic financial district, see the New York Stock Exchange, and take a photo with the iconic Charging Bull sculpture. It's a symbol of American capitalism and a popular photo spot.

activities.name: Dinner at Fraunces Tavern
activities.notes: Request a table in one of the historic dining rooms for the full experience.
activities.description: Dine in one of New York's oldest taverns, a historic landmark where George Washington bid farewell to his officers. Enjoy traditional American fare and a wide selection of beers in a colonial setting.

activities.name: Top of the Rock Observation Deck
activities.notes: Book your timed entry ticket online in advance, and aim for a clear morning for the best visibility.
activities.imageQuery: Top of the Rock observation deck view
activities.description: Ascend to the Top of the Rock for breathtaking panoramic views of the New York City skyline, including the Empire State Building and Central Park. It offers three levels of indoor and outdoor observation decks.

activities.name: St. Patrick's Cathedral
activities.notes: Entry is free; be respectful of ongoing services if present.
activities.description: Visit this magnificent Neo-Gothic Roman Catholic cathedral, a prominent landmark across from Rockefeller Center. Admire its stunning architecture, stained glass windows, and peaceful interior.

activities.name: Lunch at The Halal Guys (Food Cart)
activities.notes: Expect a line, but it moves quickly. Be sure to ask for extra white sauce!
activities.location: W 53rd St & 6th Ave, New York, NY 10019
activities.imageQuery: The Halal Guys chicken and gyro over rice
activities.description: Experience an iconic NYC street food phenomenon. Order their famous chicken and gyro over rice with their signature white sauce and hot sauce. It's a delicious, quick, and affordable meal.

activities.name: The Metropolitan Museum of Art (The Met)
activities.notes: Pick up a map at the entrance and decide which wings you want to focus on, as it's impossible to see everything in one visit.
activities.imageQuery: Metropolitan Museum of Art Egyptian wing
activities.description: Explore one of the world's largest and finest art museums, with collections spanning 5,000 years of world culture. Prioritize the Egyptian Art, European Paintings, and American Wing.

activities.name: Dinner at Pure Thai Cookhouse
activities.notes: This restaurant can get busy; consider arriving slightly before peak dinner hours or making a reservation if possible.
activities.description: Enjoy authentic Thai cuisine in the vibrant Hell's Kitchen neighborhood, known for its diverse dining scene. Try their excellent Pad See Ew or the Crab & Pork Dry Noodles.

activities.name: Central Park Exploration
activities.notes: Wear comfortable shoes as you'll be doing a lot of walking. Rent a bike for a quicker way to see more of the park.
activities.description: Wander through iconic Central Park, visiting Bethesda Terrace and Fountain, Strawberry Fields (John Lennon Memorial), and enjoying the urban oasis. It's a perfect blend of nature and city life.

activities.name: American Museum of Natural History
activities.notes: Purchase timed-entry tickets online in advance. Focus on a few key halls to avoid museum fatigue.
activities.location: 200 Central Park West, New York, NY 10024
activities.imageQuery: American Museum of Natural History dinosaur hall
activities.description: Discover fascinating exhibits on natural science, human cultures, and the universe. Don't miss the dinosaur halls, the Hall of Ocean Life, and the Hayden Planetarium.

activities.name: Lunch at Shake Shack (Upper West Side)
activities.notes: This location is often busy, but lines move quickly. Order ahead using their app if you're in a hurry.
activities.description: Enjoy a classic American burger and shake experience at this popular fast-casual spot. Try their ShackBurger and a concrete for a satisfying meal.

activities.name: The High Line & Chelsea Market
activities.notes: Start your High Line walk from the southern end (Gansevoort Street) and walk north towards Chelsea Market for a natural progression.
activities.location: The High Line (starts around Gansevoort St, New York, NY 10014) and Chelsea Market (75 9th Ave, New York, NY 10011)
activities.description: Walk along The High Line, an elevated park built on historic freight rail lines, offering unique city views and public art. Afterwards, explore Chelsea Market, a vibrant food hall and shopping destination.

activities.name: Dinner at Eataly Flatiron
activities.notes: Explore the different restaurant options within Eataly; some require reservations, while others are walk-in.
activities.description: Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine at Eataly Flatiron, a massive Italian marketplace with various restaurants, cafes, and food counters. Choose from fresh pasta, pizza, or seafood.

snapshot.tripName: Nueva York Highlights: Historia y Gastronomía

activities.name: Basílica de la Sagrada Família
activities.notes: Book tickets online well in advance for a specific time slot to avoid queues.
activities.description: Marvel at Gaudí's unfinished masterpiece, exploring its intricate facades and breathtaking interior. Focus on the Nativity and Passion facades and the stunning stained-glass windows.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: La Paradeta Sagrada Familia
activities.notes: Arrive early for lunch to secure a table, as it can get very busy.
activities.description: Enjoy fresh seafood in a casual, market-style setting where you choose your fish and they cook it on the spot. Try the grilled prawns and razor clams for an authentic local experience.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: Gothic Quarter (Barri Gòtic) Exploration
activities.notes: Wear comfortable shoes as you'll be walking on uneven cobblestone streets.
activities.description: Wander through the narrow, winding streets of Barcelona's oldest quarter, discovering hidden squares and ancient Roman walls. Explore Plaça Sant Jaume, Plaça del Rei, and the Jewish Quarter.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: Barcelona Cathedral (Catedral de Barcelona)
activities.notes: Check opening hours for tourist visits, as they can vary depending on religious services.
activities.location: Pla de la Seu, s/n, 08002 Barcelona, Spain
activities.description: Visit the stunning Gothic cathedral dedicated to Saint Eulalia, exploring its cloisters with 13 geese and beautiful chapels. Climb to the rooftop for panoramic views of the Gothic Quarter.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: Picasso Museum (Museu Picasso)
activities.notes: Book your tickets online in advance to guarantee entry and avoid long queues.
activities.description: Explore the extensive collection of early works by Pablo Picasso, showcasing his formative years and deep connection to Barcelona. Pay special attention to the "Las Meninas" series.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: El Xampanyet
activities.notes: This place is small and popular, so be prepared to stand and share a table.
activities.description: Experience a lively, traditional tapas bar known for its excellent cava and authentic Catalan small plates. Order the anchovies, cured meats, and a glass of their sparkling house wine.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: Park Güell
activities.notes: Book your timed entry ticket online well in advance, especially for morning slots, and arrive early to beat the crowds.
activities.description: Discover Gaudí's whimsical park with its iconic mosaic lizard, unique architecture, and panoramic views of Barcelona. Explore the Monumental Zone, including the main terrace and serpentine bench.
activities.recommendationReason: Lo priorizamos porque encaja con tu memoria guardada en Barcelona.

activities.name: Can Travi Nou
activities.notes: It's a bit further from the city center, consider taking a taxi or public transport.
activities.location: Carrer de Jorge Manrique, s/n, 08035 Barcelona, Spain
